feature_justification.patient demographics: age, gender, city, chronic status, and age band capture patient-level risk context.
feature_justification.visit operations: department, visit type, doctor assignment, and LOS describe encounter complexity and resource use.
feature_justification.patient history: prior visit count and prior average LOS capture repeat-utilization and historical operational burden.
feature_justification.timing: visit month, weekday, weekend flag, and registration timing support seasonal and operational-flow analysis.
feature_justification.quality flags: temporal anomaly and missing-history flags preserve known reliability issues from Phase 2.
